contents.text: Sky Attack is a Skyblock datapack for Minecraft 1.21.11. You start on a small island high up in the void and must survive, grow, and expand your island with limited resources.

• 5 Skill Systems (Mining, Logging, Farming, Combat, Fishing) – Each action grants XP and unlocks stronger drops.
 
• Compressed Items – A unique resource currency needed for progress and upgrades.
 
• Custom Loot Tables – Fishing, mob drops, and junk have been revamped to make missing Skyblock resources accessible.
 
• Custom Recipes – Resources that would be unreachable in standard Skyblock can be crafted.
 
• Hub with Goal System – A central hub area with objectives that unlock server-wide progress.
 
• Hourly Events – Each hour, a random server event occurs affecting all players.
 
• Catch-up System – Players behind the server level automatically receive an XP boost.

Overworld and Nether are completely empty – no terrain, no structures, just the void. Biomes still exist in both dimensions and affect weather, lighting behavior, as well as which mobs spawn and which fish can be caught.
